timely_topic.name: AI Leadership: The Identity Gap
timely_topic.description: 14-week campaign: 3 character weeks (Dumb Theater), 1 transition week (Alice + Columbus), 10 AI campaign weeks. April 13 - July 18, 2026.

items.title: Columbus Announcement: Why AI Outperforms Your Team
items.detail: Full newsletter list announcement. 'Why does AI outperform your team' hook. New SightShift event. Include 'not in Columbus? tell us your city' ask.

items.title: Columbus Event Announcement
items.detail: Announcement post — new SightShift event format. May 6, Columbus. Limited seats.

items.title: Story: The company that hired a motivational speaker
items.detail: Everyone was fired up for 48 hours, then nothing changed. The before/after gap.

items.title: STORY: Hype is not a plan
items.detail: Story about a leader who invested in a motivational speaker. The team felt great for a week. Two weeks later, same patterns. P.S. Columbus event mention.

items.detail: Why emotional energy without framework produces a sugar crash, not a leadership shift.

items.detail: 'What's the most fired-up you've ever been after a speaker or event — and how long did it last? Be honest.'

items.detail: Weekend email. A different angle on drift — the feeling that something shifted in your organization but you can't name when it started. P.S. Columbus event mention.

items.title: Story: The leader who replaced hard conversations with wellness
items.detail: Sound baths before quarterly reviews. The team was frustrated but couldn't name why.

items.detail: A leader whose mindfulness practice became its own form of avoidance. The team didn't need a breathing exercise — they needed a decision. P.S. Columbus event mention.

items.detail: When insecurity drives withdrawal, avoidance, letting fires burn. The leader feels at peace; the team feels abandoned. P.S. Columbus event mention.

items.title: STORY: The drill sergeant approach to leadership
items.detail: A leader who ran every initiative like a military operation. High compliance, zero buy-in. The team did what they were told — and nothing more. P.S. Columbus event mention.

items.title: STORY: Meet Alice — the leader who replaced thinking with tools
items.detail: Alice doesn't use AI as a tool — she's surrendered her judgment to it. Every decision runs through ChatGPT. She's confused efficiency with wisdom. The most dangerous leader in the AI era. P.S. Columbus tomorrow.
